prompt:
A compact operator badge resting on a dark desk mat beside a terminal keyboard and a small notebook, designed as a clean credential token for someone who can navigate Linux fundamentals and document their output. The badge appears as a simple physical card or enamel-style medallion with minimal iconography inspired by shell prompts, folders, and command lines, but without any readable text. The surrounding environment should imply hands-on systems work and disciplined documentation.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a near-future ops-workstation aesthetic: soft moody desk lighting, realistic metal or laminated-card texture, no logos, no readable characters, and no identifiable faces. The composition should be uncluttered and centered on the badge so it reads immediately as a systems-operator credential icon in DSPACE.
